title: Blue Rose
description: A collection of minor, petty tweaks to Minecraft's visuals.
body:
A simple resource pack full of random little tweaks based on the whims of one person and one person only, me.

Expect petty, stupid, funny changes and inside jokes you won't understand.

and now,
### IMPORTANT CREDITS
- Resource pack inspired by VanillaTweaks
- Using artwork commissioned from [FlawedIdeal](https://bsky.app/profile/flawedideal.bsky.social) for one of the paintings 
- i'd like to thank my best friend sonic the hedgehog
